const response = $input.first().json; const narrative = response.choices[0].message.content; const stats = $('Compute Weekly Stats').first().json; const html = `

📊 Weekly PR Digest

Week: ${stats.week_start} → ${stats.week_end}

Total PRs${stats.total_prs}
Lines Added+${stats.total_additions}
Lines Deleted-${stats.total_deletions}
Files Changed${stats.total_files_changed}
Top Contributor${stats.top_author}

🤖 AI Summary

${narrative.replace(/\n/g, '
')}

📋 PRs This Week

${stats.pr_list}
Generated automatically by PR Bot · n8n + OpenRouter `; return [{ json: { html, subject: `Weekly PR Digest — ${stats.week_end}` } }];
